plan.annotation: Band shows the supplied modeled low–high range for Q3–Q5; it is not a confidence interval.

operations.label: Observed Q1–Q2 and base forecast Q3–Q5
Modeled range labels
operations.value: Base forecast reaches 11.4; Q5 range is 9.0 to 13.8; uncertainty widens

plan.pptxFallback: In PowerPoint, the band is rendered as editable boundary lines for low and high with a translucent shape between them, plus an editable base-forecast line and observed points; all labels remain editable text.
plan.takeaway: Observed Q1–Q2 track near base; the base forecast reaches 11.4 by Q5 while the modeled range widens to 9.0–13.8.
plan.title: Forecast vs. Observed: Widening Modeled Range
